name: FAQ generation — cited question-answer pairs from sources

setup.description: Two papers (DAPA-HF, EMPEROR-Reduced) with 6 chunks including demographics and CV death data. Tests that the FAQ artifact generates Q&A pairs where every answer includes at least one citation [N], covers both trials, includes correct hazard ratios, and does not hallucinate content about absent topics.

papers.title: DAPA-HF: Dapagliflozin in Patients with Heart Failure and Reduced Ejection Fraction
EMPEROR-Reduced: Empagliflozin in Heart Failure with Reduced Ejection Fraction

mockChunks.text: Dapagliflozin reduced the composite of worsening heart failure or cardiovascular death (HR 0.74; 95% CI 0.65-0.85; P<0.001). The number needed to treat was 21 over a median follow-up of 18.2 months.
Enrolled patients were aged ≥18 years with NYHA class II-IV heart failure and LVEF ≤40%. Patients were randomized 1:1 to dapagliflozin 10mg or placebo.
A total of 4744 patients were enrolled at 410 sites in 20 countries. The median age was 66 years, 77% were male, and 42% had diabetes.
Empagliflozin reduced the composite of cardiovascular death or hospitalization for heart failure (HR 0.75; 95% CI 0.65-0.86; P<0.001). The effect was consistent across prespecified subgroups.
Empagliflozin did NOT significantly reduce cardiovascular death alone (HR 0.92; P=0.23) or all-cause mortality (HR 0.92; P=0.22). 3730 patients were randomized with a median follow-up of 16 months.
Patients were randomized to empagliflozin 10mg or placebo on top of recommended therapy. The median follow-up was 16 months.

queries.query: Generate a FAQ from these papers on SGLT2 inhibitors in heart failure
expectedBehavior: Contains Q&A pairs with cited answers
Every answer includes at least one citation [N]
failurePatterns: Missing one of the two trials

queries.query: Create a list of common questions and answers about these heart failure trials
expectedBehavior: Contains Q&A pairs with cited answers

qualityCriteria: FAQ has 5-6 Q&A pairs in **Q:** / A: format
Every answer block contains at least one [N] citation
Both DAPA-HF and EMPEROR-Reduced are covered
HR 0.74 and HR 0.75 present with correct citations
No fabricated renal, kidney, cancer, or stroke content
